visual: Pulls both hands back toward the chest palms-up in a withdrawing motion, then pushes both palms forward in a bow stance.
motion_description: From a right bow stance with arms extended, the weight shifts back onto the left leg as the torso slightly opens. At the same time, both hands turn palms upward and draw back toward the chest. The weight then moves forward again onto the right leg while both palms rotate to face outward, pushing straight ahead at chest level. The motion is executed with a slow, steady, and continuous flow.
